text.description: Compilation and diagnostics for PAWN files, including #include checking and pawncc integration. Settings managed via .pawnpro/config.json.
config.includePaths:
Pawn compiler include directories. Use `${workspaceFolder}` for project-relative paths. Example: `["${workspaceFolder}/pawno/include"]`.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` (takes precedence over this option).
config.compiler.path:
Path to the `pawncc` executable. If empty and `autoDetect` is enabled, the extension will try to detect it automatically.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.compiler.args:
Extra arguments passed to the compiler. Example: `["-d3", "-;+"]`.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.analysis.warnUnusedInInc:
When **enabled**, emits unused symbol warnings also in `.inc` files. By default only `.pwn` files receive these warnings.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.analysis.sdk.platform:
SDK platform used in the project. `omp` auto-detects `qawno/include/open.mp.inc` at the workspace root. `samp` has no auto-detection — set the path manually via `analysis.sdk.filePath`. `none` disables SDK support.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` as `analysis.sdk.platform`.
config.analysis.sdk.platform.omp: open.mp — auto-detects qawno/include/open.mp.inc at the workspace root
config.analysis.sdk.platform.samp: SA-MP — no auto-detection, set the path in analysis.sdk.filePath
config.analysis.sdk.platform.none: Disabled — no SDK file will be loaded
config.analysis.sdk.filePath:
Absolute path (or with `${workspaceFolder}`) to the centralizing `.inc` file for the SDK. For open.mp, leave empty to use auto-detection. For SA-MP, point to the file that centralizes all SDK includes.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` as `analysis.sdk.filePath`.
config.ui.separateContainer: When **enabled**, moves PawnPro views to a dedicated container in the Activity Bar.
config.server.type:
Server type. Select `samp` for SA-MP, `omp` for open.mp, or `auto` to detect automatically from the config file present (`server.cfg` or `config.json`).

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` as `server.type`.
config.server.type.auto: Auto-detect from file present (config.json → open.mp, server.cfg → SA-MP)
config.server.type.omp: open.mp — uses config.json and the log file set in logging.file
